headline: Asurion Appoints Kausik Rajgopal President, Chief Revenue Officer to Accelerate Growth
summary: Asurion, the global leader in technology care, support, and protection, today announced the appointment of Kausik Rajgopal as President, Chief Revenue Officer, effective June 22, 2026. Rajgopal will report directly to Chief Executive Officer Guru Gowrappan and oversee Asurion's global revenue organization, leading the company's client and partner growth strategy.

headline: PayPal (PYPL) Is Closing Its Venture Arm To Refocus On Core Payments
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is winding down its decade-old corporate venture arm as part of a broader restructuring. The move comes under new CEO Enrique Lores, who is refocusing the company on core payment operations and cost control. PayPal may sell existing venture positions as it exits corporate venture investing. For investors watching PayPal Holdings, this shift speaks directly to how the company wants to run its business under new leadership. PayPal has long operated at the...
